title: feat: backend API endpoint for product feedback submission
body:
## Summary

Create a backend API endpoint that allows authenticated users to submit product feedback from any bop client (MCP server, CLI, Web UI).

## Requirements

### Endpoint Design
- `POST /api/feedback` (or similar)
- Authenticated requests only (API key, OAuth, etc.)
- Accept feedback message/content
- Optional metadata: client type (mcp/cli/web), version, context

### Data Model
```
Feedback:
  - id
  - user_id / api_key_id
  - message (text)
  - client_type (mcp | cli | web)
  - client_version
  - timestamp
  - metadata (JSON, optional context)
```

### Storage
- Options to consider: database table, external service (e.g., Canny, ProductBoard), or simple append-only log
- Should support retrieval/export for product team review

### Authentication
- Reuse existing auth mechanisms where possible
- Consider rate limiting to prevent abuse

## Open Questions

- Where should feedback be stored? (internal DB vs external product feedback tool)
- What metadata is useful to collect automatically?
- Should we support attachments (screenshots, logs)?

## Related

- #258 - Client integrations (MCP, CLI, Web UI) depend on this
